channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Battle After Another Claims Top Prize at 2026 Oscars
item.description: Paul Thomas Anderson’s film 'One Battle After Another' was the undisputed victor at the 2026 Oscars, securing a remarkable six awards, including Best Picture and Best Director. The film, inspired by T...

item.title: Tanzanian Investors Expand Presence in Key Kenyan Industries
item.description: Recently, Tanzanian billionaires don dey show strong interest for Kenyan companies, making significant acquisitions across sectors. One notable move was by Edha Nahdi, Managing Director of Amsons Grou...

item.title: Nigeria’s D’Tigress put up strong fight but lose 93–86 to France in FIBA qualifiers
item.description: Naija women basketball team, D’Tigress, dem try their best but still fall 93–86 to France for Lyon, FIBA Women’s World Cup Qualifiers. For the second quarter, France dey dominate, at one point dey lea...

item.title: Highlights and Behind-the-Scenes Moments in the Oscars Winners' Room
item.description: After receiving their Oscars at the Dolby Theatre, winners are led to press rooms where journalists take photos and ask a few select questions. This year, the reporters had front-row access to stars l...

item.title: Rising Attacks on Commercial Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Since the outbreak of conflict in the Middle East, the Strait of Hormuz—a strategic waterway through which roughly 20% of the world’s crude oil and liquefied natural gas passes—has become a hotspot fo...

item.title: China Reiterates Mediation Offer Amid Ongoing Pak-Afghan Border Clashes
item.description: China has once again offered to mediate between Pakistan and Afghanistan to cool down the border tensions that have been heating up lately. Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian said the most urgent ...

item.title: Four Unauthorised Persons Arrested Near Akure Airport Following Security Alert
item.description: The Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria (FAAN) don report say dem apprehended four unauthorised persons wey dey near Akure airport. The arrest follow one alert after some suspicious people bin dey s...

item.title: Heavy Rains Cause Flooding Across Kenya, Killing 66 and Displacing Thousands
item.description: Kenya is grappling with severe flooding after heavy rains swept across the country over the past week, claiming at least 66 lives, according to police reports. Nairobi received more overnight showers,...

item.title: Sargodha Man Arrested for Alleged Family Murders over Honour Concerns
item.description: In a tragic and shocking incident from Sargodha, Punjab, police have arrested a man who allegedly killed his wife and five children in the name of 'honour'. The event took place in Chak 25 South area,...

item.title: Trump appeals to allies for help to secure Strait of Hormuz amid Iran conflict
item.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump is actively seeking international support to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil passage, after military action by the US and Israel disrupted shipping....

item.title: Highlights from the Oscars 2026 Red Carpet
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards in Los Angeles brought together a dazzling array of stars on the red carpet, with fashion taking centre stage alongside the night’s cinematic honours. Notable appearances inclu...

item.title: Robert Downey Jr. and Chris Evans Deliver Playful Comedy Sketch at 2026 Oscars
item.description: At the 2026 Academy Awards, “Avengers” co-stars Robert Downey Jr. and Chris Evans shared a humorous onstage moment while presenting the screenwriting awards. Their exchange began when Evans jokingly c...

item.title: One killed in Kishtwar landslide, 235 evacuated safely during heavy snowfall
item.description: On the intervening night of Sunday and Monday, a landslide struck near a hydro-power project site at Dangduru in Kishtwar district of Jammu and Kashmir, triggered by heavy rainfall. One worker tragica...

item.title: Queensland arrests highlight tensions between political expression and accusations of antisemitism
item.description: Queensland Police recently arrested protesters for using the phrase “from the river to the sea” under new state legislation explicitly banning this wording. This action has sparked a broader debate ab...

item.title: Peter Andre and Katie Price: From reality TV romance to amicable co-parenting
item.description: Peter Andre and Katie Price first met in 2004 on the British reality show I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here! and quickly became a high-profile celebrity couple. They got married in 2005 in a lavis...

item.title: Philippines reaffirms sovereignty over Scarborough Shoal amid South China Sea dispute
item.description: On 16 March 2026, the Philippines officially rejected China's sweeping claim of sovereignty over the entire South China Sea. The dispute escalated after the Chinese embassy in Manila claimed that a fo...

item.title: Mgao Island Port to Improve Safety and Efficiency for Bulk Cargo in Mtwara
item.description: Mtwara Port is getting a big upgrade with the new Mgao Island Port, which is being built to handle hazardous and bulk cargo more safely and in a way that protects the environment. The project, costing...

item.title: Palace and UN Officials Discuss Support for BARMM Peace and Development Programs
item.description: A delegation from the Office of the Special Assistant to the President (OSAP), led by Special Assistant Anton Lagdameo Jr., engaged with peace experts from the Permanent Mission of the Philippines to ...

item.title: President Marcos stresses improving infrastructure to enhance tourism in the Philippines
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. emphasized the need to improve the Philippines' infrastructure to strengthen the country's tourism industry. Speaking during the inauguration of the Mactan Ex...

item.title: Oil prices decline amid US-Iran tensions over Strait of Hormuz security
item.description: Oil prices fell on Monday after early gains, following U.S. President Donald Trump's call for other nations to assist in safeguarding the Strait of Hormuz, a critical route for global oil and gas ship...
